auth.roleMismatchSeller: This account is registered as a Seller. Select "Seller" to sign in or use a buyer account.

auth.tooManyRegAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
